div1.entryFree:
Square, adj. 1) having four equal sides: my queen's s. brows, Per. V, 1, 109 (a forehead as high as it is broad, consequently a high forehead).
2) suitable: for those that were, it is not s. to take on those that are, revenges, Tim. V, 4, 36. With to: if report be s. to her, Ant. II, 2, 190 (== if she is such as the report goes).
